lines.english: Why does the vicar refuse to cut down the tree?
lines.chinese: 为什么牧师拒绝砍掉这棵树？
lines.raw: Why does the vicar refuse to cut down the tree? | 为什么牧师拒绝砍掉这棵树？

lines.english: The tiny village of Frinley is said to possess a 'cursed tree'.
lines.chinese: 弗林利这个小村庄据说有一棵“被诅咒的树”。
lines.raw: The tiny village of Frinley is said to possess a 'cursed tree'. | 弗林利这个小村庄据说有一棵“被诅咒的树”。

lines.english: Because the tree was mentioned in a newspaper,
lines.chinese: 因为这棵树在报纸上被提及，
lines.raw: Because the tree was mentioned in a newspaper, | 因为这棵树在报纸上被提及，

lines.english: the number of visitors to Frinley has now increased.
lines.chinese: 弗林利的游客数量现在增加了。
lines.raw: the number of visitors to Frinley has now increased. | 弗林利的游客数量现在增加了。

lines.english: The tree was planted near the church fifty years ago, but it is only in recent years that it has gained an evil reputation.
lines.chinese: 这棵树是五十年前种在教堂附近的，但直到最近几年才声名狼藉。
lines.raw: The tree was planted near the church fifty years ago, but it is only in recent years that it has gained an evil reputation. | 这棵树是五十年前种在教堂附近的，但直到最近几年才声名狼藉。

lines.english: It is said that if anyone touches the tree, he will have bad luck; if he picks a leaf, he will die.
lines.chinese: 据说如果任何人触摸这棵树，他就会有厄运；如果他摘一片叶子，他就会死去。
lines.raw: It is said that if anyone touches the tree, he will have bad luck; if he picks a leaf, he will die. | 据说如果任何人触摸这棵树，他就会有厄运；如果他摘一片叶子，他就会死去。

lines.english: Many villagers believe that the tree has already claimed a number of victims.
lines.chinese: 许多村民相信这棵树已经夺走了许多受害者的生命。
lines.raw: Many villagers believe that the tree has already claimed a number of victims. | 许多村民相信这棵树已经夺走了许多受害者的生命。

lines.english: The vicar has been asked to have the tree cut down, but so far he has refused.
lines.chinese: 牧师被要求砍掉这棵树，但到目前为止他一直拒绝。
lines.raw: The vicar has been asked to have the tree cut down, but so far he has refused. | 牧师被要求砍掉这棵树，但到目前为止他一直拒绝。

lines.english: He has pointed out that the tree is a useful source of income,
lines.chinese: 他指出这棵树是一个有用的收入来源，
lines.raw: He has pointed out that the tree is a useful source of income, | 他指出这棵树是一个有用的收入来源，

lines.english: as tourists have been coming from all parts of the country to see it.
lines.chinese: 因为游客们从全国各地赶来参观它。
lines.raw: as tourists have been coming from all parts of the country to see it. | 因为游客们从全国各地赶来参观它。

lines.english: In spite of all that has been said,
lines.raw: In spite of all that has been said, | 尽管有各种说法，

lines.english: the tourists have been picking leaves and cutting their names on the tree-trunk.
lines.chinese: 游客们一直在摘叶子并在树干上刻下他们的名字。
lines.raw: the tourists have been picking leaves and cutting their names on the tree-trunk. | 游客们一直在摘叶子并在树干上刻下他们的名字。

lines.english: So far, not one of them has been struck down by sudden death!
lines.chinese: 到目前为止，他们中没有一个人被突然死亡击倒！
lines.raw: So far, not one of them has been struck down by sudden death! | 到目前为止，他们中没有一个人被突然死亡击倒！
